title: lomatium triternatum var. brevifolium
intro: Lomatium triternatum var. brevifolium, also known as fernleaf biscuitroot, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system and its antimicrobial and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory infections to digestive problems. The health benefits of Lomatium triternatum var. brevifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Lomatium triternatum var. brevifolium are commonly made into tinctures, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
